de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Class NotFreeIn

      • first

      • second

        private SchemaVariable second

    • Constructor Detail

      • NotFreeIn

        public NotFreeIn(SchemaVariable first,
         SchemaVariable second)
        constructs a pair of variables given two SchemaVariables. The first SchemaVariable has to occur bound in the Taclet, while the second one can stand for a an arbitrary term of formula, in order to model a pair of the not-free-in relation of an Taclet.

    • Method Detail

      • first

        public SchemaVariable first()
        returns the first SchemaVariable of the pair. This SchemaVariable has to be matched to a QuantifiableVariable

      • second

        public SchemaVariable second()
        returns the second SchemaVariable of the pair.
